code:
import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = io.read_line()
  match line
  when Some(s)
    let toks = string.split_whitespace(s)
    mut result: List<Int> = []
    mut i = 0
    mut has_prev = false
    mut prev = 0
    while i < toks.len()
      match toks.get(i)
      when Some(t)
        match string.parse_int(t)
        when Some(n)
          if not has_prev
            result = list.push(result, n)
            prev = n
            has_prev = true
          else if n != prev
            result = list.push(result, n)
            prev = n
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    mut out = ""
    mut j = 0
    while j < result.len()
      match result.get(j)
      when Some(v)
        if j == 0
          out = "#{v}"
        else
          out = "#{out} #{v}"
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
    println(out)
  when None
    println("")
  end
end
